item.title: 2021 Harley-Davidson® Street Glide® (FLHX)
item.description:
Used 2021 Harley Davidson Street Glide motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 8,698 Miles. This pre-owned H.D. FLHX offers Rinehart exhaust, quick release passenger backrest, quick release luggage rack, engine guards, smoked windscreen, factory H.D. navigation, heel to toe shifter. State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland. Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Displacement: 107 cu. in.
Engine Type: Milwaukee-Eight® 107
Bore and Stroke: 3.937 x 4.375 in.
Compression Ratio: 10.0:1
Fuel System: Electronic Sequential Port Fuel Injection (ESPFI)
Final Drive: 6th: 2.875 Gear Ratio
Front Brakes: Reflex™ Linked Brembo® Brakes with Standard ABS, 32 mm, 4-piston fixed Caliper Type
Rear Brakes: Reflex™ Linked Brembo® Brakes with Standard ABS, 32 mm, 4-piston fixed Caliper Type
Front Tire: 130/60B19 61H
Rear Tire: BW 180/55B18 80H
Wheelbase: 64 in.
Seat Height: 26.1 in. (laden)

Trail: 6.7 in.
Fuel Capacity: 6 gal.
Dry Weight: 829 lb.
Odometer: Standard

item.description:
Used 2020 Kawasaki Z H2 motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 4,924 Miles. This pre-owned Kawasaki ZX1000K offers Akrapovic exhaust, fender eliminator kit, integrated LED taillight, Evotech frame sliders, custom mirrors.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Engine Type: 4-stroke, 4-cylinder, DOHC, 4-valve, supercharged

Front Brakes: Dual radial-mount, opposed 4-piston Brembo Stylema® calipers, dual semi-floating 330mm discs, KIBS ABS

NEW ARRIVAL
MORE PHOTOS COMING SOON Engine Type: Aprilia longitudinal 65° V-4 cylinder, 4-stroke, double overhead camshafts (DOHC), four valves per cylinder
Displacement: 999.6 cc
Bore and Stroke: 78 x 52.3 mm
Cooling: Liquid
Compression Ratio: 13:1
Fuel System: Airbox with front dynamic air intakes. 4 Weber-Marelli 48-mm throttle bodies with 4 injectors and latest generation Ride-by-Wire engine management. Choice of three different engine maps selectable by the rider with bike in motion: T (Track), S (Sport), R (Road)
Ignition: Magneti Marelli digital electronic ignition system integrated in engine control system, with one spark plug per cylinder and “stick-coil in. type coils
Front Suspension: Sachs upside down front fork with diam. 43 mm stanchions. Forged aluminium calliper mountings for radial callipers. Completely adjustable spring preload and hydraulic compression and rebound damping. Wheel travel: 120 mm
Rear Suspension: Double braced aluminium swingarm; mixed low thickness and sheet casting technology. Sachs piggy back monoshock with completely adjustable: spring preload and hydraulic compression and rebound damping. APS progressive linkage. Wheel travel: 130 mm
Front Brakes: Dual 320 mm floating stainless steel discs with lightweight stainless steel rotor with 6 studs. Brembo radial calipers with 4 diam. horizontally opposed 32 mm pistons. Sintered pads. Axial pump master cylinder and metal braided brake hoses
Rear Brakes: 220-mm diameter disc; Brembo floating calliper with two 32 mm isolated pistons. Pump with integrated tank and metal braided hose

Used 2022 Harley Davidson Street Bob 114 motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 23,198 Miles. This pre-owned H.D. FXBBS offers custom levers, custom seat. State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland. Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. item.description:
***ODOMETER DISCREPANCY***


Used 2016 Aprilia Tuono V4 1100 RR motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 2,760 Miles. This pre-owned Aprilia Tuono V4 1100 RR offers Arrow exhaust, fender eliminator kit, swing arm spools, front and rear axel sliders, frame sliders, tank protectors, ASV adjustable levers.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. Front Suspension: Sachs steering damper. Sachs upside-down fork, Ø43mm stems. Fully adjustable spring preload, hydraulic compression. Wheel travel: 120 mm
Rear Suspension: Sachs single shock absorber with piggy-back, adjustable sprint preload, hydraulic compression and rebound. Wheel travel: 130 mm
Front Brakes: Double Ø320mm disc with aluminum flange. Brembo M432 mono-block radial calipers and metal braid line.

item.title: 2023 AHA CLASH 200
item.description:
***NON COMMISSION MOTORCYCLE***

Used 2023 AHA Clash 200 scooter for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 1,820 Miles. This pre-owned AHA Clash 200 is factory original from AHA.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. item.title: 2013 Harley-Davidson® Street Glide (FLHX)
item.description:
Used 2013 Harley Davidson Street Glide motorcycle for sale in Cuyahoga Falls, Ohio with 16,564 Miles. This pre-owned H.D. FLHX offers quick release tour pack, engine guards w/ highway pegs, LED brake lights, heel to toe shifter, custom high rise handlebars, custom mirrors, smoked windscreen w/ leather pouches, Aquatic AV radio.

State 8 Motorcycles is one of North East Ohio’s largest Motorsports dealers offering a wide selection of new and used Motorcycles, ATVs, Side x Sides and Dirt Bikes for sale with a variety of financing options available to help you with the purchase of your new vehicle. We are located in Cuyahoga Falls just outside Akron, Ohio and a short ride from Cleveland.

Are you from out of town? Don’t worry, we work with out of state riders all the time. We recommend HaulBikes for their professionalism and care. Schedule and rates vary. To get started visit Haulbikes.com for your delivery quote. Displacement: 103 cu. in. (1,690 cc)
